game_info.title: Worms Zone - Hungry Snake Arena
game_info.concept: **Worms Zone .io — Hungry Snake:** Players control a worm that continuously moves forward in a large 2D arena, steering its direction by dragging a finger across the screen. The primary objective is to grow the worm's length and mass by consuming scattered food pellets and the remains of other worms eliminated from the arena. Colliding the player's worm head with the body of any other worm results in immediate elimination, converting the player's worm into collectible food for others, while successfully encircling an opponent eliminates them and awards their collected mass. Various temporary power-ups, such as a speed boost (drains mass) or a magnet (attracts food), spawn periodically, and progression is measured by achieving the largest size on the live leaderboard and unlocking cosmetic worm skins.
game_info.description: Control a hungry worm in a competitive arena, growing larger by consuming colorful food pellets scattered across the map. Eliminate opponents by making them crash into your body, then feast on their remains. Collect power-ups for temporary abilities like speed boosts and food magnets. Survive as long as possible while climbing the leaderboard to become the largest worm in the arena!
game_info.controls:
Arrow Keys: Steer your worm's direction (Up/Down/Left/Right)
Space: Activate speed boost (drains mass while active)
Z: Use magnet power-up when collected
ENTER: Start game from title screen
ESC: Pause/Unpause during gameplay
R: Return to start screen from game over

TEST_1.test_description: Tests basic worm movement and food collection mechanics. Validates that the worm can navigate the arena, collect food pellets, and grow in size appropriately.
TEST_1.strategy_description: Navigate systematically through the arena collecting nearby food pellets. Avoid all AI worms by maintaining safe distance. Focus on steady growth without risky maneuvers.
TEST_1.expected_outcome: Successfully collect multiple food items, demonstrating size increase. Position values should change smoothly. No collisions with AI worms or arena boundaries should occur during normal movement.

TEST_2.test_description: Tests the win condition by growing the worm to the target size required for victory. Validates aggressive collection strategies and ability to reach maximum size.
TEST_2.strategy_description: Aggressively collect all nearby food while using strategic positioning to trap and eliminate AI worms. Consume their remains for rapid growth. Use speed boost when safe to quickly gather scattered food.
TEST_2.expected_outcome: Reach the win condition size threshold, triggering GAME_OVER_WIN state. Score should exceed the required amount. Leaderboard position should reach #1 before victory.

TEST_3.test_description: Tests worm collision mechanics and elimination. Validates that colliding with another worm's body results in proper game over state.
TEST_3.strategy_description: Intentionally navigate toward AI worm bodies to test collision detection. Verify that head-to-body contact triggers elimination correctly.
TEST_3.expected_outcome: Collision with AI worm body should trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Player worm should convert to food pellets. Game should handle elimination gracefully without errors.
TEST_3.description: Tests worm collision mechanics and elimination. Validates that colliding with another worm's body results in proper game over state.
TEST_3.strategy: Intentionally navigate toward AI worm bodies to test collision detection. Verify that head-to-body contact triggers elimination correctly.
TEST_3.expected: Collision with AI worm body should trigger GAME_OVER_LOSE state. Player worm should convert to food pellets. Game should handle elimination gracefully without errors.

TEST_4.test_description: Tests power-up collection and usage mechanics. Validates that magnet and speed boost abilities function correctly.
TEST_4.strategy_description: Navigate to spawn locations of power-ups and collect them. Activate magnet when food is nearby. Use speed boost in open areas to test mass drain mechanic.
TEST_4.expected_outcome: Power-ups should be added to inventory when collected. Magnet should attract nearby food. Speed boost should increase velocity while draining mass. Visual feedback should appear for both effects.
TEST_4.description: Tests power-up collection and usage mechanics. Validates that magnet and speed boost abilities function correctly.

TEST_4.expected: Power-ups should be added to inventory when collected. Magnet should attract nearby food. Speed boost should increase velocity while draining mass. Visual feedback should appear for both effects.

TEST_5.test_description: Tests the encirclement mechanic where surrounding an opponent eliminates them. Validates complex spatial collision logic.
TEST_5.strategy_description: Position the worm to create loops around smaller AI worms. Complete circles by connecting head near tail while an opponent is inside the loop.
TEST_5.expected_outcome: Successfully encircled AI worms should be eliminated and converted to food. Player should receive bonus mass. Encirclement detection should work reliably without false positives.
TEST_5.description: Tests the encirclement mechanic where surrounding an opponent eliminates them. Validates complex spatial collision logic.
